synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2025-21916 Important: Oracle Linux 9 valkey security update
full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2025-21916

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2025-21916.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
valkey-8.0.6-2.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
valkey-devel-8.0.6-2.el9_7.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
valkey-8.0.6-2.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
valkey-devel-8.0.6-2.el9_7.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/valkey-8.0.6-2.el9_7.src.rpm

Related CVEs:

CVE-2025-46817
CVE-2025-46818
CVE-2025-46819
CVE-2025-49844




Description of changes:

[8.0.6-2]
- rebase to 8.0.6 for CVE-2025-49844 CVE-2025-46817 CVE-2025-46818 CVE-2025-46819
